---
title: "USGS Water Services"
engine: julia
---

```{julia}
#| echo: false
#| output: false
using GeoDataAccess
using GeoDataAccess: DataAccessPlan, fetch, MetaData, USGSWaterServices
using Dates, JSON
```

The [USGS National Water Information System](https://waterservices.usgs.gov/) provides streamflow,
water quality, and related hydrological data from 1.5 million+ sites across the US.  No API key
is required.

```{julia}
MetaData(USGSWaterServices())
```

## Daily Values

Retrieve daily mean discharge for the Potomac River near Washington, DC (site 01646500):

```{julia}
plan = DataAccessPlan(USGSWaterServices(), (-77.1, 38.9),
    Date(2024, 1, 1), Date(2024, 1, 31);
    sites = ["01646500"],
    variables = [Symbol("00060")])
plan
```

```{julia}
files = fetch(plan)
data = JSON.parsefile(files[1])
ts = data["value"]["timeSeries"][1]
println("Site: ", ts["sourceInfo"]["siteName"])
println("Variable: ", ts["variable"]["variableDescription"])
println("Values: ", length(ts["values"][1]["value"]), " records")
```

## Instantaneous Values

For higher-resolution (~15-minute) data, use `service="iv"`:

```julia
plan = DataAccessPlan(USGSWaterServices(service="iv"), (-77.1, 38.9),
    Date(2024, 1, 1), Date(2024, 1, 7);
    sites = ["01646500"],
    variables = [Symbol("00060")])
```

## Finding Sites

Site numbers can be found at [USGS Water Data](https://waterdata.usgs.gov/).

## Variables

Variables are specified by USGS parameter codes:

| Code | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `00060` | Streamflow / Discharge (ft³/s) |
| `00065` | Gage height (ft) |
| `00010` | Water temperature (°C) |
| `00011` | Air temperature (°C) |
| `00045` | Precipitation (in) |
| `00095` | Specific conductance (µS/cm at 25°C) |
| `00300` | Dissolved oxygen (mg/L) |
| `00400` | pH (standard units) |
| `63680` | Turbidity (FNU) |
